framework.structure: ['If someone does'] + [Very Specific Observable Behaviour] + ['they are'] + [Disturbing Hidden Intent]
framework.trigger: Social threat detection — protecting the viewer from invisible manipulation
framework.example: If someone mirrors your body language in the first 30 seconds, they are running a dominance test on you.

script.hook: If someone mirrors your body language in the first 30 seconds, they are running a dominance test on you.
script.body: Psychologists have known this for decades but it never makes it into mainstream education. The people who use this have an unfair advantage in every conversation.
